query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.platform, pv.title, LEFT(pv.body, 200) as body_preview, LENGTH(pv.body) as body_length, pv.status
FROM platform_variants pv
JOIN content_packages cp ON pv.content_package_id = cp.id
JOIN ideas i ON cp.idea_id = i.id
WHERE i.title LIKE '%Top Industry Trends%'
ORDER BY pv.id
LIMIT 10;
